en-US.name: Flytrap Care: Pitcher & Sundew
en-US.subtitle: Carnivorous Plant Care Guide
en-US.promotional_text: Venus flytrap, Nepenthes, or sundew keeper? Check today's care score, dormancy timing, and species-specific feeding guidance. Per-species, per-setup. No account.
en-US.description:
Stop guessing whether your Venus flytrap needs more sun or whether your Nepenthes is ready for feeding. Flytrap Care gives you a daily score based on your local weather, your species, and your specific setup.

Every carnivorous plant keeper knows the frustration: a routine that worked last month suddenly causes leaf rot, or your sundew stops producing dew. The reasons sit in environmental data — humidity, photoperiod, temperature swings, dormancy cues — that nobody wants to track manually every day.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add your plant: species, container type, location (indoor/outdoor/bog), growing media.
2. Flytrap Care pulls your local weather and runs species-specific care math.
3. You get a daily care score with the exact action — water now, mist twice, hold off feeding, or trigger dormancy prep.

Under a minute to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Daily Care Score
A single number plus verdict — GO, CAUTION, or HOLD — built on Magnus humidity math, photoperiod calculation, and species-specific dormancy thresholds.

Species Library
7 carnivorous plants supported: Venus flytrap (Dionaea muscipula), Sarracenia (North American pitcher), Drosera capensis and Drosera spatulata (sundews), Pinguicula (butterwort), Nepenthes maxima and Nepenthes ventrata (tropical pitchers), and Cephalotus (Australian pitcher).

Single-Plant Tracking
Add one plant, see today's score, read the core reason line. Free forever.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Track multiple plants
- 7-day forecast (humidity, temperature, dormancy trigger window)
- Dormancy calendar with pre-dormancy water reduction guidance
- Feeding tracker with prey size and timing per species
- Misting schedule for humid species
- Daily outcome logging — your scores adjust based on your specific environment over 30 days
- Push notifications for water times, feeding windows, and dormancy preparation

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch weather data from Open-Meteo. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Flytrap Care provides care guidance based on local weather data and general species guidelines. It is not a substitute for hands-on growing experience or specialty nursery advice.

Terms of Use (EULA):
